description: Planning + task breakdown for a pre-existing specification

requirements.description: Users can create tasks with title, description, priority, and due date
Tasks can be assigned to team members
Real-time updates when tasks are modified by any team member
Dashboard loads within 2 seconds on 3G connections

userStories.story: As a project manager, I want to create and assign tasks so that work is distributed efficiently
As a team member, I want to see real-time task updates so that I always have current information

acceptanceCriteria.criteria: Given a logged-in PM, when they fill the task form and submit, then the task appears in the board within 1 second
Given two users viewing the same board, when one modifies a task, then the other sees the update within 2 seconds
